faq.lead: Short answers to the most common questions about booking, arrival and the parking service.

items.q: How far is the parking from Sarajevo Airport?
items.a: M Park Sarajevo is located close to Sarajevo Airport. The exact address and arrival instructions are sent after the online booking.

Yes. Vehicle safety while you travel is our priority: controlled access and 24/7 CCTV surveillance. Our goal is for travellers looking for reliable Sarajevo airport parking to have peace of mind when leaving for their flight.

Prices are transparent and depend on the length of stay: 9 KM per day for 1–3 days, 8 KM per day for 4–6 days, and just 7 KM per day for 7+ days. The longer you leave your vehicle at our private parking near Sarajevo Airport, the lower the daily rate. The price includes 24/7 CCTV surveillance and a free transfer to the airport.

items.q: How does the booking system work?
items.a: Bookings are only possible through the form on this site. You enter your name, phone number, optionally email, and the arrival and departure dates. After submitting, our team contacts you for confirmation — no bookings via WhatsApp. The same applies if you're looking for private parking at Sarajevo airport with a clear cost.
Yes — in most cases you can cancel or change the date with early notice. Exact rules and deadlines are agreed upon confirmation, so that private parking Sarajevo remains organised for all travellers.

Access and surveillance are organised with 24/7 CCTV. Arrival and key handover details (including hours for handing over keys) are confirmed at booking, so parking for travellers in Sarajevo is clear and predictable.
